root: ^Sam: I think... we might have caught every type of fish I know about in this harbor!
^Noelle: Really? Don't you think there could be some more hiding down there?

maybe: ^Sam: Maybe... I know we've at least gotten all the fish I've ever seen! Maybe theres a type of fish that's super good at dodging our bait, though...
^Noelle: Maybe I'll keep fishing to try to find it!
dont_think_so: ^Sam: I don't think so... I've been fishing for a real long time and these are all I've ever seen!
^Noelle: Just you wait! I'll keep fishing and find you a new type of fish!
ending: ^Noelle: Now that I'm just as good as you, I can teach all my friends at school!
^Sam: You bet! I hope I'll see your whole class down here some day, fishing with all of us.
^Sam: Say, you don't have your own rod yet, do you? What do you say I "sell" this one to you for the next Rainbow Trout you catch?
^Noelle: You got a deal! I'll go get you one right now!
